mechanism: Inhibits the B-cell lymphoma 2 (BCL-2) protein, promoting apoptosis.
additional_notes: Common in treating chronic lymphocytic leukemia.

mechanism: Blocks Janus kinase 1 and 2 pathways, affecting immune and cancer cell signaling.
additional_notes: Used in myelofibrosis treatment.

mechanism: Inhibits tumor cell proliferation and angiogenesis by targeting Raf kinase, VEGF, and PDGFR.
additional_notes: Approved for liver, kidney, and thyroid cancers.

mechanism: Inhibits BCR-ABL tyrosine kinase, affecting cancer cell proliferation.
additional_notes: Commonly used in chronic myeloid leukemia.

mechanism: Inhibits Janus kinase pathways, regulating immune function and cancer growth.
additional_notes: Approved for rheumatoid arthritis treatment.

mechanism: Inhibits BTK, interfering with B-cell receptor signaling.
additional_notes: Used for chronic lymphocytic leukemia and mantle cell lymphoma.

mechanism: Targets BCR-ABL and c-KIT tyrosine kinases, reducing cancer cell proliferation.
additional_notes: First-line treatment for chronic myeloid leukemia.

mechanism: Inhibits PARP enzyme, impairing cancer cell DNA repair mechanisms.
additional_notes: Used in BRCA-mutated cancers.

mechanism: Blocks XPO1, leading to nuclear retention of tumor suppressor proteins.
additional_notes: Approved for multiple myeloma.

mechanism: Inhibits cyclin-dependent kinases 4 and 6, halting cancer cell cycle progression.
additional_notes: Used in HR-positive breast cancer.

mechanism: Inhibits BCR-ABL and other tyrosine kinases, targeting cancer cell growth.
additional_notes: Effective against T315I mutation in chronic myeloid leukemia.

mechanism: Blocks PD-1, enhancing immune response against tumors.
additional_notes: Used in various immunotherapy contexts; requires tailored concentrations.

mechanism: Blocks PD-1, enhancing immune response against tumors.
additional_notes: Similar to nivolumab with tailored use in immune assays.

mechanism: Blocks PD-L1, enhancing immune surveillance.
additional_notes: Concentration dependent on immune parameters.

mechanism: Inhibits mTOR signaling pathway, affecting tumor cell growth.
additional_notes: Approved for renal cell carcinoma, TSC, and more.

mechanism: Inhibits mTOR pathway, reducing cancer cell growth and proliferation.
additional_notes: Used for renal cell carcinoma.

mechanism: Blocks CXCR4 axis, affecting hematopoietic cell mobilization.
additional_notes: Used in stem cell mobilization for transplantation.

mechanism: Modulates immune function and inhibits angiogenesis.
additional_notes: Common for multiple myeloma treatment.

mechanism: Inhibits proteasome, disrupting protein degradation in cancer cells.
additional_notes: Used in multiple myeloma and mantle cell lymphoma.

mechanism: Inhibits histone deacetylases, affecting gene expression and cancer cell death.
additional_notes: Used for cutaneous T-cell lymphoma.
